info.title: Percy Internal API
info.description: Internal API for the Percy Discord bot, consumed by the klappstuhl.me BFF dashboard.

schema.title: Response Get Guild Config Api V1 Guilds  Guild Id  Get
Response Patch Guild Config Api V1 Guilds  Guild Id  Patch
Response Get Ai Config Api V1 Guilds  Guild Id  Ai Get

patch.description: Toggle the server-wide AI feature flags (only known flag names are honoured).

schema.title: Response Patch Ai Flags Api V1 Guilds  Guild Id  Ai Patch

put.description: Set a per-channel AI override. An override that controls nothing is removed.

schema.title: Response Put Ai Override Api V1 Guilds  Guild Id  Ai Overrides  Channel Id  Put
Response Delete Ai Override Api V1 Guilds  Guild Id  Ai Overrides  Channel Id  Delete

post.description:
Answer a dashboard command-palette question with Percy's AI assistant.

Gated like every other AI behaviour: the guild must have the ``assistant`` AI feature
enabled *and* the engine must be reachable. When either is false this returns
``{"available": false, ...}`` (never an error) so the palette degrades gracefully to its
navigation/action results. The answer is grounded in the real command catalogue, and any
command it names is resolved and returned as a suggestion (invented commands are dropped).

post.description:
Create the preset milestone reward roles (levels 5-100) and register them.

Idempotent by role name: an existing role with the same name is reused
rather than duplicated, so re-running only fills in what's missing.

post.description:
Bulk-create tags from a parsed (name, content) list.

Access is gated server-side (admin/Manage-Server) by the dashboard, which
also malware-scans and sanitises the uploaded file. Tag creation goes
through the parameterised repo layer (no string-built SQL), so the import
cannot inject SQL. Duplicates and reserved names are skipped, not failed.

post.description:
Control playback from the dashboard (pause/resume/skip/back/volume/seek/loop/shuffle/jump/move/stop).

Enforces voice-channel presence and DJ-mode permissions, mirroring the
in-Discord control panel exactly.

schema.title: Response Post Music Control Api V1 Guilds  Guild Id  Music Control Post

PatchSettingsBody.title: PatchSettingsBody
PatchSettingsBody.description: Partial update; omitted fields keep their value. ``max_bet=0`` clears the cap.

BearerAuth.description: The shared INTERNAL_API_TOKEN, sent as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.
